name: 16oz Stoneware Coupe Coffee Mug Gray - Threshold™: Modern Microwave & Dishwasher-Safe Drinkware, Cadmium-Free
description:
Enjoy iced tea on hot sunny days or a steaming cup of joe by the evening fire in style with this 16-Ounce Stoneware Avesta Mug from Threshold™. Crafted from shiny glazed finished stoneware, this mug features a simple yet stylish look that makes it easy to mix in with the rest of your drinkware. The mug holds 16 fluid ounces — perfect for a satisfying serving of coffee, tea, cocoa or any other drink. Best of all, the stoneware mug is microwave- and dishwasher-safe for easy reheating and cleanup for added convenience.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
